title: Deportation Defense Lawyer | U.S. Immigration Lawyers
content:
## Deportation & Removal

## Preventing Deportation and Removal

### Tran Law Group — U.S. Immigration Lawyers
Whether or not deportation proceedings can be stopped will depend on the unique facts and circumstances of any given case. If it is possible to prevent removal or to defend yourself successfully in removal proceedings, the advice and representation that our experienced U.S. immigration attorneys have can be the difference between being deported or continually living in The United States. Contact us online to schedule a free consultation to discuss how we can defend you from deportation or removal from the United States.
At Tran Law Group , we defend people threatened with deportation or removal from the United States because of criminal convictions, divorce, abusive marital relationships, unlawful entry into the country or for remaining in the U.S. past their visa’s expiration date (unlawful presence). Some of the petitions which may stop deportation or removal proceedings include:
- Adjustment of status
- Waivers of inadmissibility
- Withholding of removal
- Cancellation of removal
- Writs of habeas corpus

### Professional, affordable immigration help for clients in the United States and from around the world
Our attorneys handle in-custody and out-of-custody cases, immigration bond and removal hearings, and provide effective deportation defense.
Our practice includes representation before the USCBP (United States Customs and Border Protection), the USICE (United States Immigration and Customs Enforcement), the Board of Immigration Appeals (BIA), the Executive Office for Immigration Review (EOIR), and the 9th Circuit Court of Appeals.
Arrange a free consultation to see what we can do. Call us in Garden Grove, California, at (714) 702-1437 or contact us online .
